sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: BOEING CO의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2분기 매출이 227억 달러로 상용기 150대 인도에 힘입어 증가했습니다.
GAAP 주당손실은 0.92달러, 비GAAP 핵심 주당손실은 1.24달러로 적자가 이어졌습니다.
737 생산이 월 38대에 도달하며 생산 정상화가 진전됐습니다.

businessChanges.text: 737 생산이 월 38대에 도달했고 총 수주잔고는 6,190억 달러로 늘었습니다.
총부채는 533억 달러로 만기 채무 상환으로 소폭 감소했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 227억 달러에도 GAAP 주당 0.92달러 손실로 적자를 지속했습니다.
영업현금흐름은 2억 달러 플러스였으나 잉여현금흐름은 마이너스 2억 달러를 기록했습니다.
현금 및 시장성 투자자산은 230억 달러로 분기 초 237억 달러에서 줄었습니다.

watchItems.text: 적자가 이어지는 가운데 737 증산이 실제 인도와 현금흐름 개선으로 이어지는지 확인이 필요합니다.
잉여현금흐름이 다시 마이너스로 돌아선 만큼 현금 소진 추세의 반전 여부를 지켜봐야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a202506jun308kprex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Boeing Reports Second Quarter Results Second Quarter 2025 • 737 production reached 38 per month in the quarter • Revenue increased to $22.7 billion primarily reflecting 150 commercial deliveries • GAAP loss per share of ($0.92) and core loss per share (non-GAAP)* of ($1.24) • Operating cash flow of $0.2 billion and free cash flow (non-GAAP)* of ($0.2) billion • Total company backlog grew to $619 billion, including over 5,900 commercial airplanes Table 1. Summary Financial Results Second Quarter First Half (Dollars in Millions, e  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.7 billion = 227억 달러; $0.2 billion = 2억 달러; $619 billion = 6,190억 달러; $22.7 = 22.7달러; $0.92 = 0.92달러; $1.24 = 1.24달러; $0.2 = 0.2달러; $619 = 619달러; $1,090 = 1,090달러; $643 = 643달러; 42,245 million = 422억 4,500만 달러; 1,794 million = 17억 9,400만 달러; 33,435 million = 334억 3,500만 달러; 1,090 million = 10억 9,000만 달러; 1,176 million = 11억 7,600만 달러; 1,439 million = 14억 3,900만 달러.

r operations and deliver higher quality airplanes, products and services to our customers,” said Kelly Ortberg, Boeing president and chief executive officer. "As we look to the second half of the year, we remain focused on restoring trust and making continued progress in our recovery while operating in a dynamic global environment." 1 Table 2. End (Billions) 2Q 2025 1Q 2025 Cash and investments in marketable securities 1 $23.0 $23.7 Consolidated debt $53.3 $53.6 1 Marketable securities consist primarily of time deposits due within one year classified as "short-term investments." Cash and investments in marketable securities totaled $23.0 billion, compared to $23.7 billion at the beginning of the quarter, primarily driven by the debt repayment and free cash flow usage in the quarter. Debt was $53.3 billion, down from $53.6 billion at the beginning of the quarter due to the pay down of maturing debt. The company maintains access to credit facilities of $10.0 billion, which remain undrawn. Total company backlog at quarter end was $619 billion. 2 Segment Resul  Normalized numeric aliases: $23.0 billion = 230억 달러; $23.7 billion = 237억 달러; $53.3 billion = 533억 달러; $53.6 billion = 536억 달러; $10.0 billion = 100억 달러; $619 billion = 6,190억 달러; $23.0 = 23.0달러; $23.7 = 23.7달러; $53.6 = 53.6달러; $53.3 = 53.3달러; $10.0 = 10.0달러; $619 = 619달러.
